global.description: The ad features a prominent offer with a clear call to action and branding.

elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold, large text in the center stating '2-for-1 tonight Late-night deals available' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'PlateSprint' displayed prominently at the top, featuring a modern font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button at the bottom with the text 'Get offer', designed to attract attention.

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: A small badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold letters.
